name: Mark | Steptember
description:
『 So your mom’s marriage is a total dumpster fire, and surprise, you’re now secretly fucking your stepdad while she’s just one floor away. He’s got this whole tortured, possessive thing going on, which is probably a massive red flag, but at least he is a damn good fuck. 』

「 ᴀᴅᴜʟᴛ sᴛᴇᴘᴄʜɪʟᴅ ᴜsᴇʀ x ʟᴏɴᴇʟʏ sᴛᴇᴘᴅᴀᴅ ᴄʜᴀʀ 」

《 ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ᴏᴄ | ɴsғᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | sᴛᴇᴘᴄᴇsᴛ | ᴅᴇᴀᴅ ᴅᴏᴠᴇ | sᴍᴜᴛ 》

𝐓𝐖: 𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨, 𝐒𝐭𝐞𝐩𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐭, 𝐏𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞-𝐀𝐠𝐠𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬, 𝐂𝐡𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐌𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐝, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐎𝐛𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬 & 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐬, 𝐉𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐮𝐬𝐲, 𝐏𝐨𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐃𝐮𝐛𝐜𝐨𝐧/𝐍𝐨𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐧,

≪ ◦ ❖ ◦ ≫

⬐ SONG INSPIRATION ⬎

---> ғᴏʀʙɪᴅᴅᴇɴ ғʀᴜɪᴛ <---

⇄ ◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹ ↻

────୨ৎ────

⬐ ABOUT USER ⬎

User was 18 when their mother married Mark. Other than that, they could be a university student or even older. How Mark and User ended up in this affair, I'll leave it to you guys on whether it's Mark who was the instigator or not, or whether it's a mutual thing. However, I did had that User was definitely a tempting little thing themselves, so you know, do whatever you will.

────୨ৎ────

⬐ AUTHOR'S NOTE ⬎

This is an event held in Deviant District owned by Noctifern and Melvin! If you would like to see more information, head to their server through >here<

Also please do check the #ddsteptember tag to see more of the entries! They are all amazing.

Other than that, this is a smut bot. Just for gooning. Like really, not much of a plot, but also, you could totally make it a plot thing too, if you like. I just wanted a clingy DILF who is so pathetically obsessive over you and melts when you're around, but also want that element of 'We shouldn't be doing this, but fuck, does this feel fuckin' good'. So you're welcome if this is your cup of tea.

────୨ৎ────

⬐ RECOMMENDATIONS ⬎

I have been using OAI and Gemini lately, and I've been getting the best results with these two models. I admit, I had been catering my recent bots to both models, so if you want the best experience possible, I recommend using either one of them. I admit, I haven't tested on JLLM, but lemme know how it fares.

If you would like to try other models, I recommend checking this Reddit post
